task_completion.description: Verify the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Sample Order Lines' visible in the Data Elements pane on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface.

task_completion.description: Verify a bar chart visualization has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a bar chart rendered on the main canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the chart displays 'Sales' by 'Product Category'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Grammar pane or the chart axes to confirm 'Product Category' is assigned to the Category (X-axis) and 'Sales' is assigned to the Values (Y-axis).

task_completion.description: Verify the exact text annotation is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text box or annotation on the canvas (likely in Narrate/Story mode) containing the exact text: 'Technology generates the highest revenue'.

task_completion.description: Verify the workbook is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window or a save dialog to confirm the workbook is named 'Sales_Story_Presentation'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface being actively used, not just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is genuinely rendered by the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart should appear within the Oracle Analytics canvas with standard UI elements (Grammar pane, Data pane), not as a static image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI to create a dummy save file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands showing the use of 'touch' or 'echo' to create a file named 'Sales_Story_Presentation.dva' without actually saving it through the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must use the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop. The visualization must be a bar chart showing 'Sales' (measure) by 'Product Category' (dimension). The story must include a text annotation with the exact text: 'Technology generates the highest revenue'. The final workbook must be saved as 'Sales_Story_Presentation' (which creates a .dva file).
